todos.content: Quote fails: fetchBatchQuote sends bt.balance (raw wei string) but some tokens have balance='0' from manual adds — filter those out properly
Quote fails: no error surfaced to user when getMultiInputQuote fails — add proper error toast with the actual API error message

Gas high/fail: sendTx passes no gas limit — Relay quote has stale maxFeePerGas/maxPriorityFeePerGas in item.data that wallets use verbatim, causing inflated fees. Must strip those fields and estimate gas fresh.
Gas high/fail: after approve step, deposit tx is sent immediately without waiting for allowance to propagate — causes deposit to revert with out-of-gas on the approval check
Gas high/fail: wagmiConfig only has static chains — if batchChain is a Relay chain not in wagmiConfig, sendTx silently uses wrong RPC for gas estimation
Quote fails: fetchBatchQuote sends bt.balance (raw wei string) but some tokens have balance='0' from manual adds — filter those out properly
Quote fails: no error surfaced to user when getMultiInputQuote fails — add proper error toast with the actual API error message

Gas high/fail: sendTx passes no gas limit — Relay quote has stale maxFeePerGas/maxPriorityFeePerGas in item.data that wallets use verbatim, causing inflated fees. Must strip those fields and estimate gas fresh.
Gas high/fail: after approve step, deposit tx is sent immediately without waiting for allowance to propagate — causes deposit to revert with out-of-gas on the approval check
Gas high/fail: wagmiConfig only has static chains — if batchChain is a Relay chain not in wagmiConfig, sendTx silently uses wrong RPC for gas estimation

state.title: 3 todos
